title: Priests and Warriors Collide
description: Gan Fall, the priests, and the Shandia warriors show how dangerous Skypiea’s dials and sky combat can be.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene centers on Conis, Gan Fall, Shandia warrior, Wyper, Nico Robin. Gan Fall, the priests, and the Shandia warriors show how dangerous Skypiea’s dials and sky combat can be.

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: If Luffy comes here and saves us,

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: We can escape from here together!?

dialogue.speaker: Shandia warrior
dialogue.text: to escape to that forest over there...

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: This is the way of the world.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: You must give your life to God!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: a strong opponent. He is well trained,

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: An old man like you is useless!!

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Let's just play with him... Fuzza!!

summary: Gan Fall, the priests, and the Shandia warriors show how dangerous Skypiea’s dials and sky combat can be.
